title: World PIDS-Pack [MTR 4/JCM]
description: This resource pack adds numerous custom PIDS to the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod. It is only useable for MTR 4 and must be used with the Joban Client Mod (JCM), otherwise the pack will not work.
body:
Release Trailer:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rsw9d3KQjb0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a resource pack containing JavaScript scripts. It adds numerous custom PIDS to the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod. It is only useable for MTR 4 and must be used with the Joban Client Mod (JCM), otherwise the pack will not work.

Version compatibility
| JCM-Version | WPP-Version |
| :---: | :---: |
| >= 2.2.0 | >= 1.11.1 |
| =< 2.1.2 | =< 1.11.0 |


<details>
<summary>The following PIDS are currently being added</summary>
<hr>Germany<hr>
  
 - Munich S-Bahn
 - Munich Subway
 - Hamburg (Bus/Tram)
 - Hamburg S-Bahn
 - Hamburg Subway
 - Hamburg Subway (colored)
 - Hamburg Subway (new)
 - Hanover (Light Rail)
 - Frankfurt Subway
 - Nuremberg S-Bahn
 - Nuremberg Subway
 - DB (2016)
 - DB (big)
 - Karlsruhe Light Rail
 - Rostock Light Rail
 - Berlin S-Bahn
 - Berlin Subway
 - DB DSA+
<hr>Austria<hr>

 - ÖBB
 - ÖBB (2022)
 - ÖBB (arrival and departure board)
 - ÖBB S-Bahn
 - Vienna Subway
<hr>Sweden<hr>

 - Stockholm Subway
 - SJ (Statens Järnväg)
<hr>Switzerland<hr>

 - SBB
<hr>Australia<hr>

 - Sydney
<hr>Netherlands<hr>

 - Dutch
 - Dutch Arrival (Thanks to [GdNickDash](https://modrinth.com/user/gdnickdash))
 - Dutch (Bus)
 - Dutch (Tram) (Thanks to [szandorthe13th](https://modrinth.com/user/szandorthe13th))
 - Rotterdam (Metro)
<hr>Hungary<hr>

 - Hungary (departure board)
<hr>Turkey<hr>

 - Izmir Subway
<hr>Greek<hr>

 - Athen (Suburban)
 - Thessaloniki (Metro)
<hr>Belgium<hr>

 - SNCB (single line)
 - SNCB (single line - old)
 - SNCB (departure board)
<hr>Finland<hr>

 - Finish VR
<hr>Portugal<hr>

 - Portuguese (departure board)
<hr>United States of America<hr>

 - WMATA
<hr>Poland<hr>

 - Polish (PKP-Style)
<hr>Denmark<hr>

 - Copenhagen (Metro)
<hr>Norway<hr>

 - Norway
<hr>England<hr>

 - Euston
 - London (Bus)
<hr>Italy<hr>

 - Trenitalia
<hr>Singapore<hr>

 - North East Line
</details>
  
If you have whishes for PIDS, that should get added, then you can message me on discord or send a message in the ["World PIDS Pack" Thread](https://canary.discord.com/channels/763273460465270816/1403724816061825075) on the MTR Discord Server (Username: teampommes).

### Specials
the specials have moved to [https://teamstar.pro/world_pids_pack/en/specials](https://teamstar.pro/world_pids_pack/en/specials)
